title: vitis kiusiana
intro: Vitis kiushiana, also known as Japanese grapevine or Japanese wild grape, is a species of grapevine native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis kiushiana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Vitis kiushiana can be found in tea, tincture, and extract form, and are often used to promote overall well-being and longevity.
